Philippines.headline: Volcanic eruption is on going for Mayon in Philippines
Philippines.description: Volcano Mayon is emitting ash clouds according to the regional VAAC. The aviation alert level is Orange.

Philippines.headline: Green flood alert in Philippines
Philippines.description: On 13/06/2026, a flood started in Philippines, lasting until 17/07/2026 (last update). The flood caused 2 deaths and 11146 displaced .

Philippines.headline: Drought is on going in Australia, Indonesia, Cambodia, Laos, Papua New Guinea, Philippines, Thailand, Vietnam
Philippines.description: The  Drought notification level is Green.

Colombia.headline: Drought is on going in Colombia, , Ecuador, Panama, Venezuela
Colombia.description: The  Drought notification level is Green.
